issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, only happy path.

scenarios.name: kustomize-application-with-autosync
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a complete `argoproj.io/v1alpha1 Application` with `syncPolicy.automated` (prune + selfHeal), the `CreateNamespace=true` syncOption, and the `resources-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io` finalizer for cascade deletion; baseline usually omits the finalizer and the CreateNamespace syncOption.

scenarios.name: applicationset-multi-cluster-prod
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses `kind: ApplicationSet` with a `clusters` generator selecting `environment: production` and templates the app name/server via `{{name}}`/`{{server}}`; baseline tends to suggest creating one Application per cluster manually, missing the generator pattern entirely.
